mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bpm_form ( id, name, status, conf, fields, remark, create_by, create_by_name, create_time ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{conf, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{fields, jdbcType=CLOB, typeHandler=com.yy.framework.flowable.handler.ListToJsonTypeHandler}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE bpm_form SET name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status, jdbcType=BIGINT}, conf = #{conf, jdbcType=CLOB}, fields = #{fields, jdbcType=CLOB, typeHandler=com.yy.framework.flowable.handler.ListToJsonTypeHandler}, remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_by_name = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bpm_form WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, status, conf, fields, remark, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, update_by, update_by_name, update_time FROM bpm_form WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT id, name, status, conf, fields, remark, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, update_by, update_by_name, update_time FROM bpm_form WHERE 1 = 1
AND name LIKE '%' || #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND status = #{status, jdbcType=BIGINT}
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, name, status, conf, fields, remark, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, update_by, update_by_name, update_time FROM bpm_form WHERE id IN
#{item, jdbcType=BIGINT}
